Incantations of the god-slaying black flame are written within.

cards.description: Significantly negates damage in mixed physick

cards.description: Temporarily boosts all damage negation in physick

cards.description: Makes consecutive attacks grow stronger in mixed physick

cards.title: Crimsonwhorl Bubbletear
cards.description: Converts damage received into HP in mixed physick

cards.title: Sliver of Meat
cards.description:
A slice of thinly carved beast flesh.
Material used for crafting items.
Found by hunting herbivorous beasts.

cards.title: Beast Liver
cards.description:
The fresh liver of a beast; a luscious fruit of life.
Material used for crafting items.
Found by hunting herbivorous beasts.

cards.title: Lump of Flesh
cards.description:
A lump of beast flesh filled with rich juices.
Material used for crafting items.
Found by hunting carnivorous beasts.

cards.title: Beast Blood
cards.description:
Fresh beast blood, glinting with gold.
Material used for crafting items.
Found by hunting carnivorous beasts.

cards.title: Old Fang
cards.description:
A rarely-seen specimen of beast fang.
Material used for crafting items.
Found by hunting carnivorous beasts.

cards.title: Budding Horn
cards.description:
A rarely-seen specimen of a young, budding horn.
Material used for crafting items.
Found by hunting herbivorous beasts.

cards.title: Flight Pinion
cards.description: Flight feather of birds.

cards.title: Hidden Plumage
cards.description:
Rarely-seen dark plumage found
inside the wing.

cards.title: Four-Toed Fowl Foot
cards.description:
A four-toed fowl's foot.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Turtle Neck Meat
cards.description:
A splendid, lengthy cut of turtle neck meat.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Human Bone Shard
cards.description:
Fragment of bone with dun mottling.
Material used for crafting items.
Found by hunting Those Who Live in Death.

cards.title: Great Dragonfly Head
cards.description:
Head of a large dragonfly.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Slumbering Egg
cards.description:
Owl eggs that will never hatch.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Crab Eggs
cards.description:
Eggs of large crabs which dwell in the shallows.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Land Octopus Ovary
cards.description:
Puffy, milky white ovary of a land octopus.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Miranda Powder
cards.description:
Pollen from a man-eating miranda flower.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Strip of White Flesh
cards.description:
Thin strips of flesh taken from a bloodless creature.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Golden Dung
cards.description:
Someone's excrement. It has a golden tinge.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Thin Beast Bones
cards.description:
Thin, hard beast bones.
Material used for crafting items.
Found by hunting beasts.

cards.title: Hefty Beast Bone
cards.description:
Thick, solid beast bones.
Material used for crafting items.
Found by hunting particularly large beasts.

cards.title: Glinstone Scrap
cards.description:
Unremarkable glintstone, found along roadways everywhere.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: String
cards.description: Boasting no special qualities, this is merely a goodly length of string.

cards.title: Living Jar Shard
cards.description:
A fragment of a living jar,
hardened after its death.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Albinauric Bloodclot
cards.description:
The thick, coagulated blood of the Albinaurics.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Stormhawk Feather
cards.description:
A feather from a hawk that lived as one
with the storms.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Poisonbloom
cards.description:
Flower that grows in toxic terrain.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Trina's Lily
cards.description:
A light-purple water lily that is on the verge of wilting.
Material used for crafting items.
Exceedingly rare to find.

cards.title: Fulgurbloom
cards.description:
Yellow flower that grows in lightning-struck lands.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Miquella's Lily
cards.description:
A delicate water lily of unalloyed gold that has started to fade and wilt.
Material used for crafting items.
Exceedingly rare to find.

cards.title: Grave Violet
cards.description:
A purple flower than blooms in graveyards.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Faded Erdleaf Flower
cards.description:
An Erdleaf flower that has faded to a pale scarlet, found blooming in rotten lands.
Material used in crafting items.

cards.title: Erdleaf Flower
cards.description:
A dusky yellow flower that has started to fade to brown, found throughout the Lands Between.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Altus Bloom
cards.description:
A golden-tinged flower from a succulent plant that blooms on the Altus Plateau.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Fire Blossom
cards.description:
A half-ashen and smoldering flower that blooms on the Mountaintops of the Giants.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Golden Sunflower
cards.description:
A golden sunflower that grows facing the Erdtree.
Material used for crafting items.
Found near Minor Erdtrees.

cards.title: Tarnished Golden Sunflower
cards.description:
A large flower that blooms facing the Erdtree.
Material used for crafting items.
Found near Minor Erdtrees.

cards.title: Herba
cards.description:
Evergreen leaves that give off a faint light.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Arteria Leaf
cards.description:
Dark red leaves with thick, swollen veins.
Material used for crafting items.
Exceedingly rare to find.

cards.title: Dewkissed Herba
cards.description:
A herb that grows in the false night
in and around the Eternal City.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Rowa Fruit
cards.description:
Berry-like red fruits that grow in shrubs.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Golden Rowa
cards.description:
A Rowa fruit tinted with gold.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Rimed Rowa
cards.description:
A berry-like fruit, thought to be the original strain of Rowa.
Material used for crafting items.
Found in frigid highlands.

cards.title: Bloodrose
cards.description:
Blood-slick roses that bloom in blood-soaked soil.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Eye of Yelough
cards.description:
A shrub fruit bursting with ripened pulp.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Crystal Bud
cards.description:
A young plant, crystalized before it could mature.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Rimed Crystal Bud
cards.description: A young plant, frozen into a crystal before it could mature. Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Sacramental Bud
cards.description:
An immature bud containing fresh blood.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Mushroom
cards.description: A fungal growth that thrives in damp thickets and elsewhere. Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Melted Mushroom
cards.description:
A mushroom that grows in the false night in and around the Eternal City.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Toxic Mushroom
cards.description: A mushroom covered in toxic mold that grows in rotten lands. Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Root Resin
cards.description:
Resin secreted from the roots of the Greattree.
Can also be found near trees on the surface.
Material used in crafting items.

cards.title: Cracked Crystal
cards.description:
A cracked, impure, degraded, and altogether
unremarkable crystal.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Sanctuary Stone
cards.description:
A rare piece of stone fragment found near places where ruins have fallen from the sky.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Nascent Butterfly
cards.description:
An arcane butterfly with translucent wings.
Material used for crafting items.
Exceedingly rare to find.

cards.title: Aeonian Butterfly
cards.description:
A butterfly with withered, scarlet wings
found in the Swamp of Aeonia.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Smoldering Butterfly
cards.description: An eternally burning butterfly found near wildfires and elsewhere. Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Silver Firefly
cards.description:
Firefly that gives off a silvery light.
Material used in crafting items.
Found near bodies of cold water untouched by sunlight.

cards.title: Gold Firefly
cards.description:
Firefly that gives off a golden light.
Material used in crafting items.
Found near bodies of water close to Minor Erdtrees.

cards.title: Glintstone Firefly
cards.description:
A firefly whose glowing tail has hardened into
glintstone, widely found in Liurnia Lake.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Golden Centipede
cards.description:
The golden, desiccated remains of a centipede.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Silver Tear Husk
cards.description:
A hardened husk shed by a formless life form known as the Silver Tear, found in and around the Eternal City.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Gold-Tinged Excrement
cards.description:
Someone's excrement. It has a golden tinge.
Material used for crafting items.
Often hidden in woods and thickets.

cards.title: Blood-Tainted Excrement
cards.description:
The bloody excrement of a carnivorous beast.
Material used for crafting items.
Found in the land of the new dynasty.

cards.title: Cave Moss
cards.description:
Faintly luminescent moss that grows in dark caves.
Material used in crafting items.

cards.title: Budding Cave Moss
cards.description:
Faintly luminescent moss that grows in dark caves,
speckled with tiny, yellow flowers.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Crystal Cave Moss
cards.description:
Faintly luminescent moss that grows in dark caves,
laced with fine crystals.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Yellow Ember
cards.description:
An ember taken from the eye socket of a corpse.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Volcanic Stone
cards.description:
A smoldering rock containing hot gas.
Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Formic Rock
cards.description: Rock formed from solidified giant ant venom. Highly acidic. Material used for crafting items.

cards.title: Gravel Stone
cards.description:
A small clump of sharp, pointed stones.
Material used for crafting items.
